headline: Mercury General Expands Wildfire Mitigation Through BurnBot
summary: MCY backs BurnBot to advance wildfire mitigation efforts, aiming to improve underwriting stability and insurance availability in high-risk areas.

raw.headline: Mercury General Expands Wildfire Mitigation Through BurnBot
raw.summary: MCY backs BurnBot to advance wildfire mitigation efforts, aiming to improve underwriting stability and insurance availability in high-risk areas.

headline: Travelers Urges Homeowners to Protect Against Contractor Fraud as Storm Season Approaches
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., May 14, 2026--In recognition of Contractor Fraud Awareness Week (May 18-22), The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) is providing guidance to help homeowners protect themselves from potential fraud when recovering from a storm.
